summary: Comprehensive testing of LEAMSS Immigration Portal iteration 15 completed. All 31 backend API tests pass (100%). All user roles (Admin, Case Manager, Partner, Client) login and access dashboards successfully. All major features verified working: sales with online/bank_transfer payment methods, sale approval with client credentials, case manager assignment, information sheet CRUD, activity logs with real data, commissions display, document upload/download, workflow step updates.

categories.admin_dashboard: 5/5 passed - Stats, all sales, pending sales, cases, users endpoints work
categories.sales_payment_methods: 3/3 passed - Products, online payment, bank_transfer payment all work
categories.sale_approval: 1/1 passed - Approve sale with client credentials works
categories.case_manager_dashboard: 2/2 passed - My cases and stats work
categories.information_sheet: 1/1 passed - Save and retrieve information sheet works
categories.activity_logs: 2/2 passed - Logs and stats have real data
categories.commissions: 2/2 passed - Partner commissions and partner report work
categories.user_impersonation: 2/2 passed - Admin can impersonate, non-admin denied
categories.partner_dashboard: 2/2 passed - My sales and stats work

frontend_tests.login_page: PASSED - Loads correctly with demo credentials displayed
frontend_tests.admin_dashboard: PASSED - Stats (4 Pending Sales, 2 Active Cases, $157,000 Revenue, 1 Open Ticket)
frontend_tests.admin_sales_tab: PASSED - Shows ALL sales with filter tabs (All/Pending/Approved/Rejected), Approve/Reject buttons visible
frontend_tests.admin_activity_log: PASSED - Shows 50 total activities with login events from all user types
frontend_tests.admin_commissions: PASSED - Shows $15,700 total commission with partner breakdown table
frontend_tests.case_manager_dashboard: PASSED - Stats (My Cases: 2, Pending Review: 2, Documents: 2)
frontend_tests.case_manager_my_cases: PASSED - Shows 2 cases with case details
frontend_tests.case_manager_case_detail: PASSED - Information Sheet button, Request Additional Document button, Workflow Steps with Update status dropdown
frontend_tests.information_sheet_dialog: PASSED - Opens with all sections (Personal, Contact, Education, Work, Language) and shows saved data
frontend_tests.partner_new_sale_dialog: PASSED - Payment method dropdown with Bank Transfer, Cash, Check, Online Payment options
frontend_tests.client_dashboard: PASSED - Case progress, workflow steps with status, Quick Actions

features_verified: Admin login and dashboard data loads correctly - VERIFIED
Admin Sales tab shows ALL sales with status filter (all/pending/approved/rejected) - VERIFIED
Sale creation with 'online' payment method - VERIFIED (API and UI)
Sale creation with 'bank_transfer' payment method - VERIFIED (API and UI)
Sale approval returns client_credentials for new clients - VERIFIED (API)
Client credentials dialog with Copy/Email/WhatsApp buttons - VERIFIED (code review)
Case manager assignment via PUT /api/cases/{id}/assign-manager - VERIFIED
Case manager login and dashboard - VERIFIED (my_cases count shows correctly)
Case manager update workflow step status - VERIFIED (POST /api/cases/update-step works)
Information sheet save and retrieve - VERIFIED (all field types work)
Document upload via POST /api/documents/upload - VERIFIED
Document download via GET /api/documents/download/{id} - VERIFIED
Activity logs have real data - VERIFIED (50 activities, login events visible)
Commissions tab shows partner commission data - VERIFIED ($15,700 total)
Partner login and dashboard - VERIFIED
Partner sales list shows their sales with commission data - VERIFIED
Client login and dashboard - VERIFIED
Client dashboard shows case status and documents - VERIFIED
Global search - VERIFIED (GET /api/search/global?q=Canada works)
User impersonation - VERIFIED (POST /api/auth/impersonate/{user_id} works)
Partner report - VERIFIED (GET /api/sales/partner-report works)
seed_data_creation: Test sales created with 'online' and 'bank_transfer' payment methods during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: LEAMSS Immigration Portal iteration 15 fully tested and working. All reported issues from user have been fixed: 1) Info sheet saving/displaying - WORKING, 2) Payment method online/bank_transfer - WORKING, 3) Documents uploading/opening - WORKING, 4) Sales visible in admin - WORKING (with filter tabs), 5) Commission data showing - WORKING ($15,700 total), 6) Activity logs have real data - WORKING (50 activities), 7) Case manager assignment - WORKING, 8) Credential sharing options (copy/email/whatsapp) - IMPLEMENTED in client credentials dialog. Backend uses MySQL/MariaDB. Test file /app/backend_mysql/tests/test_iteration15.py contains 31 comprehensive tests.
